dashboard.syncConfirm: Run Git sync? This may take a while.
dashboard.lastRunsTooltip: Shows status of recent runs (green=success, red=failed, yellow=running)
dashboard.pipelineActiveTooltip: Active: pipeline can run | Inactive: pipeline is disabled

auth.providerUnavailable: This login provider is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
auth.subtitle: Pipeline Orchestrator
auth.brandSub: Schedule, run, and observe your data & ML workloads — with live logs, resource metrics, and Git-synced definitions.
auth.signInWorkspace: Sign in to your FastFlow workspace.
auth.requestAccessHint: Sign in with a provider to request access.

errors.generic: An error occurred. The application has been notified.

runs.statusFilterHint: Filter runs by status: PENDING = waiting to start, RUNNING = in progress, SUCCESS = completed successfully, FAILED = failed
runs.statusTooltipFailed: ✗ FAILED: Run ended with an error
runs.statusTooltipWarning: ⚠ WARNING: Run ended with a warning
runs.durationTooltip: Calculated from start and end time
runs.exitCodeTooltip: 0 = success, ≠ 0 = error. Standard UNIX exit code.

settings.title: Settings
settings.uiDisplayHint: These options apply to all users and all browsers. They are stored in the database.
settings.showAttributionHint: Applies to the login page, info screens, and the sidebar.
settings.showVersionHint: Applies to the login page, info screens, sidebar, and the header update banner.
settings.envOnly: Settings are currently loaded from environment variables only.
settings.envHint: To change settings permanently, edit the .env file or set the corresponding environment variables.
settings.concurrentRunsTooltip: How many pipelines can run at the same time
settings.linkErrorAlreadyLinked: {{provider}} is already linked to another user account.
settings.linkAccountsHint: Link accounts to sign in with multiple providers. Email may differ per provider; linking works via "Connect now".
settings.loginBackgroundHint: Applies to all users and devices. Stored in the database (system settings).
settings.headerTimezonesHint: Which two time zones are shown in the header clock (toggle or side by side). Applies to all users.
settings.headerTimezonesMustDiffer: The two time zones must be different.
settings.linkStartFailed: Could not start account linking. Please try again.
settings.unlinkConfirm: Do you really want to remove the link to {{provider}}?
settings.unlinkLastProviderBlocked: The last linked provider cannot be removed.
settings.executorK8s: Active: Kubernetes (Jobs) – Pipeline runs execute as K8s jobs.
settings.executorDocker: Active: Docker (socket proxy) – Pipeline runs execute as Docker containers.
settings.brandingLogoInfo: Public http(s) URL to an image (PNG, SVG, …). Used on the login page and sidebar. This setting overrides the LOGIN_BRANDING_LOGO_URL environment variable; leave empty to use the environment value again.
settings.brandingLogoHint: Leave empty to use the logo from LOGIN_BRANDING_LOGO_URL (deployment).
settings.showUnconfiguredOauthOnLogin: Show unconfigured OAuth providers on the login page
settings.showUnconfiguredOauthOnLoginHint: When off, only providers with credentials configured in the deployment are shown. The account linking section in Settings is unchanged.
settings.editLockTooltipLocked: Locked: click to enable editing (helps prevent accidental changes).
settings.editLockTooltipUnlocked: Unlocked: settings can be changed. Click again to lock.
settings.dependencyAuditInfo: Daily (pip-audit) all pipelines with requirements.txt are checked for known vulnerabilities (CVE). On finding: email and/or Teams (as configured under Notifications).
settings.cronInfo: Cron with 5 fields: minute hour day month weekday. Default: 0 3 * * * (daily at 3:00).
settings.dependencyNotifyNote: On vulnerabilities found, email and/or Microsoft Teams (as configured under Notifications) will be notified.
settings.maxRunsInfo: Maximum number of runs to keep per pipeline. Older ones are deleted.
settings.maxAgeInfo: Runs older than X days are deleted automatically
settings.maxLogSizeInfo: Log files larger than X MB are truncated or deleted
settings.containerTimeoutInfo: Maximum container runtime in seconds. None = unlimited.
settings.retryAttemptsInfo: Number of automatic retries on failure
settings.lastBackupInfo: Time of last successful log upload to S3/MinIO (reset on restart).
settings.s3ConfigHint: Configuration is stored in settings. Secrets are stored encrypted.
settings.s3TestOnSaveHint: When enabled, a successful save triggers an S3 connectivity test (only if S3 backup is enabled).
settings.forceFlushTooltip: Runs immediate cleanup: deletes old logs per retention rules, cleans orphan Docker containers. Cannot be undone.
settings.forceFlushModalTitle: Force flush (cleanup) – what will be flushed?
settings.cleanupLogDesc: Cleans log files, metrics files, and database entries
settings.cleanupDockerDesc: Cleans orphan Docker containers and volumes
settings.cleanupWarning: Warning: This action cannot be undone. All deleted data will be lost permanently.
settings.cleanupDeleteOldest: Deletes oldest runs per pipeline (keeps max {{count}} runs per pipeline)
settings.cleanupTruncateLogs: Truncates or deletes log files larger than {{mb}} MB
settings.cleanupOrphanContainers: Deletes orphan containers with label 'fastflow-run-id' (no matching DB entry)
settings.recipientsHint: Comma-separated list of email addresses for notifications
settings.notificationApiHint: Allow scripts/CI to send email and Teams notifications via API key. Enable below, set rate limit, and create keys.
settings.notificationApiKeysEmpty: No keys yet. Create a key to use in scripts (header: X-Notification-Key).
settings.keyGeneratedOnce: This key is only shown once. Copy and store it securely.
settings.notificationApiKeyCreated: Key created. Copy it now; it will not be shown again.
settings.envVarRestart: Environment variables. An application restart is required.
settings.smtpPasswordTitle: SMTP password must be set via SMTP_PASSWORD environment variable

sync.clearConfirm: Delete all pipelines in the directory (including .git)? You can then clone a new repository via Sync. This action cannot be undone.
sync.clearSuccess: Pipelines directory cleared. You can now sync a new repo.
sync.cachedPipelinesTooltip: These pipelines were pre-heated during sync for faster execution
sync.saveSettingsNote: Note: Settings are saved only for the current instance.
sync.pipelinesSubdirTooltip: If your pipelines are in a subfolder in the repo (e.g. pipelines/), enter the folder name here. Empty = repo root.
sync.clearPipelinesNote: If pipelines (e.g. examples) already exist in the directory, it must be cleared first before a new repository can be cloned.
sync.stepBranch: Enter branch and optionally pipelines subdirectory, then Save and "Test configuration".
sync.deployKeyGenerated: Deploy key generated. Add the public key in GitHub (Deploy keys).
sync.urlMustStart: URL must start with https://, http://, git@ or ssh://
sync.enterSshUrl: Please enter the SSH repository URL first
sync.deployKeyOnlySsh: Deploy key can only be generated for SSH URLs (git@... or ssh://...)
sync.minIntervalError: Auto-sync interval must be at least 60 seconds
sync.repoIntroPlain: HTTPS: URL + optional personal access token. SSH: URL + deploy key (recommended: generate on server).
sync.deployKeySectionHint: The server generates a key pair. Add only the public key in GitHub (Settings → Deploy keys) — the private key is not required there.
sync.deployKeyGithubHint: In GitHub: Settings → Deploy keys → Add deploy key. Then run "Test configuration" or sync.
sync.helpBulletHttpsSsh: HTTPS: URL + optional PAT (private repos). SSH: URL + deploy key (easiest: generate deploy key, add public key in GitHub).
sync.connectNewRepoHint: If pipelines (e.g. examples) already exist in the directory, it must be cleared first before a new repository can be cloned.
sync.autoSyncIntervalHint: Interval in seconds (minimum: 60). Example: 300 = every 5 minutes.
sync.settingsEnvPersistNote: For persistent changes, edit the .env file.
sync.logCompletedDetail: Sync completed for branch {{branch}} in {{duration}}s ({{count}} pipeline(s) cached)
sync.repoTokenHint: Personal access token with repo scope. Leave empty for public repos.
sync.manualPrivateKeyHint: Paste the private key if you do not use a server-generated key.
sync.subtitle: Pipelines are discovered from your repository
sync.hostKeyMismatchText: The last sync failed because the SSH host key the server presented no longer matches the one pinned on first connect. This is expected if the remote server rotated its key, but it can also mean the connection is being intercepted — an admin must review and confirm before sync can resume.
sync.hostKeyContactAdmin: Ask an admin to review and reset the pinned host key.
sync.hostKeySectionHint: Review the pinned host key for this repository's SSH host, or reset it after a legitimate server-side key rotation.
sync.hostKeyPanelHint: Comparing the key pinned for {{host}} against what the server presents right now.
sync.hostKeyScanError: Could not query the current server key: {{detail}}
sync.hostKeyNoPinnedEntry: No host key is pinned yet — nothing to reset.
sync.hostKeyNotApplicable: Host key reset does not apply to the current sync configuration.
sync.hostKeyConfirmLabel: Type the repository URL to confirm
sync.hostKeyConfirmHintPrefix: This cannot be undone. To confirm, type the exact repository URL:
sync.hostKeyResetSuccess: Host key was reset and re-pinned.
sync.hostKeyConfirmMismatch: Confirmation text does not match the repository URL.

dependencies.runSecurityScanConfirm: Running a security scan can take a while. Continue?
dependencies.runSecurityScanHint: Runs a live pip-audit scan — rate-limited and may take a while
dependencies.intro: Libraries and versions of all pipelines with requirements.txt.
dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.scanPromptOrResults: Click "Run security scan" to start a new CVE scan, or view the last saved results below.
dependencies.lastScanError: Could not load last scan results.

pipelineDetail.triggerRunHint: Trigger a run with the base configuration
pipelineDetail.runConcurrencyLimit: Concurrency limit reached — try again later.
pipelineDetail.runScheduleHint: Run now with this schedule's environment overrides
pipelineDetail.noEnvOverrides: No overrides — uses the base environment.
pipelineDetail.lastCacheWarmupTooltip: Time of last pre-heating. Pipelines with cache start faster.
pipelineDetail.downstreamTooltip: When this pipeline finishes, other pipelines can be started automatically. Configurable in pipeline.json or via UI.
pipelineDetail.timeoutInfo: Maximum runtime in seconds. Pipeline is terminated if exceeded.
pipelineDetail.retryAttemptsInfo: Number of retry attempts on failure
pipelineDetail.maxInstancesInfo: Maximum number of concurrent runs for this pipeline
pipelineDetail.resetStatsTooltip: Resets all statistics for this pipeline. Runs and data are preserved.
pipelineDetail.webhooksDisabled: Webhooks are disabled for this pipeline.
pipelineDetail.webhooksEnableHint: To enable webhooks, add webhook_key to pipeline.json (or per entry in schedules[]) in the repository.
pipelineDetail.webhookStandardInfo: Triggers a run with the default configuration (no schedule-specific env/limits)
pipelineDetail.webhookRunConfigInfo: Triggers a run with run config "{{id}}" (env/limits from schedules[]).
pipelineDetail.noDownstreamTriggered: No downstream triggers configured. When this pipeline finishes, no other pipeline is started automatically.
pipelineDetail.onRouteTooltip: Start this downstream pipeline only when the upstream pipeline writes this specific route string to FASTFLOW_ROUTE_FILE (set_route('...') in your code). Exit code stays 0. Leave empty to use on_success / on_failure instead.
pipelineDetail.requirementsInfoHint: Whether a requirements.txt file is present
pipelineDetail.confirmResetStats: Really reset statistics for this pipeline?
pipelineDetail.infoStatusHint: Status is set in pipeline.json. “Active” means the pipeline can run.
pipelineDetail.infoPythonVersionHint: Set in pipeline.json via python_version (e.g. 3.10, 3.11, 3.12). If omitted, the default is used (e.g. 3.11).
pipelineDetail.infoHardLimitsHint: Hard limits — the pipeline is stopped if exceeded
pipelineDetail.infoSoftLimitsHint: Soft limits — monitoring only; the pipeline keeps running if exceeded
pipelineDetail.schedulesSub: A pipeline can run on multiple schedules — each carries its own environment overrides on top of the base config.
pipelineDetail.noSchedules: No schedules configured. Add a cron expression in pipeline.json.
pipelineDetail.resourceLimitsSub: Soft limits warn; hard limits terminate the container.
pipelineDetail.environmentSub: Injected into the container at runtime. Secrets are encrypted at rest.
pipelineDetail.environmentCronHint: Schedule-level environment overrides are listed in the Configuration tab.
pipelineDetail.environmentEmpty: No environment variables exposed by the API yet.

users.title: Users
users.accessDeniedBody: You do not have permission to access user management. This feature is only available to administrators.
users.toastInviteCopied: Invitation link created and copied to clipboard. Valid until {{until}}.
users.confirmBlock: Do you really want to block this user?
users.confirmUnblock: Do you really want to unblock this user?
users.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this user? This cannot be undone.
users.confirmRejectJoin: Do you really want to reject this join request?
users.roleEditHint: Readonly: read-only. Write: write access. Admin: full access.
users.roleInviteHint: Readonly: read-only (view pipelines and runs). Write: start pipelines, manage secrets. Admin: full access (user management, settings).
users.name: Name
users.joinRequestsInfo: Users signed in via OAuth and are waiting for approval. Approve or reject.
users.activeUsersInfo: All users sign in via GitHub or Google. The first admin is set via INITIAL_ADMIN_EMAIL; others via invitations or join approvals.
users.emailFromProvider: From GitHub or Google. May be empty if not shared with the provider.
users.roleTooltipReadonly: Readonly: view pipelines and runs only
users.statusTooltipActive: User is active and can sign in
users.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
users.toastInviteCreatedWithLink: Invitation link created and copied to clipboard: {{link}}

scheduler.newScheduleHint: Schedules are defined in pipeline.json — opens GitHub to add one
scheduler.editInGithubHint: Edit pipeline.json on GitHub (add/remove schedules there)
scheduler.editDisabledHint: GitHub repository not configured — edit pipeline.json in your repo
scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.editError: GitHub link for pipeline.json not available (no GitHub repo configured)
scheduler.toggleTooltip: Click to enable or disable this job

setupWizard.title: Welcome to Fast-Flow
setupWizard.text: Complete the initial setup to get started.

warnings.title: Stability notices
warnings.diskLow: Low disk space: only {{gb}} GB free
warnings.gitSyncStale: No successful Git sync for over {{hours}} hours

api.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

headerTime.showStandard: Default: one time zone with toggle

concurrency.label: Concurrency
concurrency.hintHigh: Limit often reached — consider increasing capacity or checking load.

runEnv.secretsNote: Secret values are not shown for security (***).
runEnv.none: No environment variables or parameters set

averageRuntime.empty: No successful runs available for runtime analysis
averageRuntime.title: Average runtime (last {{days}} days)

successRate.empty: No data available for trend analysis
successRate.title: Success rate trend (last {{days}} days)

resourceComparison.empty: No metrics available for resource comparison
resourceComparison.title: Resource usage comparison ({{count}} runs)

audit.adminOnlyBody: The audit log is restricted to administrators. Ask an admin if you need access.
audit.ipNotCaptured: IP address is not captured yet
audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Log of all relevant actions (visible to admins only).
audit.subtitle: Immutable record of every workspace action

secrets.adminOnlyBody: Viewing decrypted secrets is restricted to administrators. Ask an admin if you need access.
secrets.subtitle: Encrypted at rest (Fernet) · values are never displayed
secrets.intro: Secrets come from the database or from pipeline.json (encrypted_env / default_env). Below you see both: DB entries and keys used in pipelines.
secrets.envKeysFromPipelines: Env keys from encrypted_env and default_env of all pipelines (values are not shown here).
secrets.title: Secrets & parameters
secrets.encryptHint: Enter plaintext, encrypt, and add the ciphertext to pipeline.json under encrypted_env.
secrets.encryptSuccess: Value encrypted. Add to pipeline.json under encrypted_env.
secrets.encryptResultHint: Add to pipeline.json under encrypted_env, e.g.: "KEY": "<ciphertext here>"
secrets.noEntriesPipeline: No env keys found in pipeline.json
secrets.showHideTooltip: Click to show or hide value

invite.title: Join request
invite.invalidLinkDesc: The invitation link is incomplete or invalid.
invite.invitedTitle: You have been invited to Fast-Flow!
invite.invitedDesc: Sign in with one of the providers below to accept the invitation. The email must match the invitation.

requestSent.title: Request sent
requestSent.body: Your join request has been created. An administrator will review it.
requestSent.note: You may receive an email once you have been approved. Until then, you cannot access the app here.
requestSent.loginLink: If you have already been approved, you can sign in here

accountBlocked.title: Account blocked
accountBlocked.body: Your account has been blocked. Please contact an administrator.

schedulerExtra.noRuns: No runs yet for this job
